name: Chocolate Carmel Pecan Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine crumbs and margarine in a 9-inch springform pan until well mixed. Press onto the bottom and 1 1/4 inches up the sides of the pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Microwave caramels and evaporated milk in a large microwavable bowl on HIGH for 1 1/2 minutes. Stir; microwave for 1 minute longer. Stir until caramels are completely melted and smooth.
4. Pour caramel into crust. Top with pecans.
5. Beat cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until well blended. Add eggs, beating well.
6. Mix in chocolate; pour over pecans.
7. Bake for 40 minutes or until firm. Cool on a wire rack. Cover; refrigerate. Garnish as desired.
8. Makes 12 to 16 servings.
